markdown:
#  Invoice Administrator Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Generate Lien Waivers 
  1. Create a new invoice or open an existing invoice on a Procore project. 
#####  Tip
**How do you create an invoice?** An invoice administrator can create an invoice and enter the data on behalf of the invoice contact. Alternatively, the administrator can invite the downstream collaborator's invoice contact to enter and submit their invoice. See [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices).
  2. In the invoice, scroll down to the **Lien Waivers** card. Procore Pay automatically generates the appropriate lien waiver(s) and shows the date on the Lien Waivers card. New lien waivers are automatically placed in the _Pending Signature_ status. ![Lien Waivers Pending Signature](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/32bb01230b52e1cc7e185c78ee225f3b/69beb66d84476ce6d0ded21d0c6dcb5e/lien-waivers-pending-signature.png?fm=webp)
#####  Tips
     * **How does Procore know what kind of lien waiver(s) to generate?** First, your company's Payments Admin follows the steps in [Create Lien Waiver Templates](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/create-lien-waiver-templates) and [Enable Lien Waivers in the Company Payments ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-lien-waivers)[Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-lien-waivers). Next, an invoice administrator on your project follows the steps in [Enable Lien Waivers & Set Default Templates on Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-templates-on-projects). The project must have a 'State' selected in the Project level Admin tool on the General tab in the [Project Location](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/update-general-project-information) section. It must also match the 'State' defined in the project's default template.
     * **Don't see a Lien Waivers card on the invoice?** A Payments Admin must [Enable Lien Waivers in the Company Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-lien-waivers). In addition, an invoice administrator must complete the steps in [Enable Lien Waivers & Set Default Templates on Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-templates-on-projects). Once enabled, the **Generate Lien Waivers** button appears.
     * **Are specialty contractors notified about lien waivers?** Yes. To alert specialty contractors when one or more lien waivers are available to sign, Procore Pay sends an automated email notification to all designated invoice contacts on the commitment. See [Add Invoice Contacts to a Purchase Order or Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-contacts).
![Generate Lien Waivers Empty State](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f813a3fe626d6643e14683c3f7424e5a/22d290ecfeb5209040a1b473a9f1f9d7/generate-lien-waivers-empty-state.png?fm=webp)

description: This guide shows users with invoice administrators how to manage Procore Pay features with the Invoice Management tools in Procore. | Generate Lien Waivers
